[e][h]Brawl Stars Championship 2026: Chinese Mainland Finals
League Information
Series:
Brawl Stars Championship 2026
Organizer:
Supercell
Game:
荒野乱斗
Type:
Offline
Location:
 China
 Hong Kong
 Taiwan
 Macau
Format:
Double-elimination
Prize Pool:
¥155,000 CNY
(≃ $22,896 USD)

2026-07-??
Teams:

A-Tier

Chronology
Elimination Round

About

[edit]

Chinese Mainland Finals is the concluding event of the 2026 Chinese Mainland circuit. Four best teams by points will compete for two LCQ slots in offline format.

Broadcast Talent

[edit]
  • Host:
    • TBA
  • Chinese Commentators:
    • TBA
  • English Commentator:
    • TBA

Format

[edit]
  • Qualified are 4 best teams from Elimination Round
  • Double-elimination bracket
  • All matches are Bo5xBo3
  • Top 2 teams qualify for Last Chance Qualifier

Prize Pool

[edit]
¥155,000 CNY (≃ $22,896 USD) are spread among the participants as seen below:
Place

¥ CNY
Qualifies To

(Converted $ USD prizes are based on the exchange rate on Jun 20, 2026: ¥1 CNY ≃ $0.14772 USD)
